title: 3D FIBSEM CLEM Mouse Brain Tissue Protocol
author: Yumei Wu

steps.title: Anesthetize Mouse
steps.instruction: Mouse is anesthetized with a Ketamine/Xylazine anesthetic cocktail (16 mg/ml Ketamine and 0.8 mg/ml Xylazine) injection.

steps.title: Transcardial Perfusion
steps.instruction: Perfused transcardially with 37 °C pre-warmed 4% PFA and 0.05% Glutaraldehyde in 0.1M Phosphate buffer (PB) (0.1M Na2HPO4+0.1M NaH2PO4, PH7.4) at 5-6 ml/min with a pump.

steps.title: Brain Dissection and Fixation
steps.instruction: Dissect the brain out and keep in the same fixative overnight at 4 °C.

steps.title: PB Buffer Wash
steps.instruction: Wash 3x20min in 0.1M PB buffer.

steps.title: Brain Sectioning
steps.instruction: Sagittally section the brain at 50 µm thickness using a vibratome.

steps.title: Mount Sections on Slides
steps.instruction: Mount the sections on glass slides in 0.1 M PB, coverslipped.

steps.title: Fluorescence Imaging and Post-fixation
steps.instruction: Acquire the fluorescence images using an Olympus SliceView VS200 slide scanner equipped with a Hamamatsu Orca-Fusion camera and a 40x Olympus UPlanXApo objective. Sections containing abundant tdTomato puncta is post-fixed in 2.5% glutaraldehyde with 2 mM CaCl2 (J.T. Baker) in 0.1 M sodium cacodylate buffer for 2–3 hours on ice.

steps.title: Osmium Tetroxide & Ferrocyanide Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubate in 2% osmium tetroxide, 1.5% potassium ferrocyanide (K4Fe(CN)6) (Sigma-Aldrich), and 2 mM CaCl2 in 0.1 M sodium cacodylate buffer for 1 hour on ice.

steps.title: Thiocarbohydrazide Treatment
steps.instruction: Treat the sections with thiocarbohydrazide (TCH) for 20 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Second Osmication
steps.instruction: Second osmication in 2% osmium tetroxide in water for 30 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Uranyl Acetate Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubate the sections in 2% aqueous uranyl acetate overnight at 4 °C.

steps.title: Ethanol Dehydration (20%)
steps.instruction: Dehydration in 20% etoh for 5 min

steps.title: Ethanol Dehydration (50%)
steps.instruction: Dehydration in 50% etoh for 5 min

steps.title: Ethanol Dehydration (70%)
steps.instruction: Dehydration in 70% etoh for 5 min.

steps.title: Ethanol Dehydration (90%)
steps.instruction: Dehydration in 90% etoh for 5 min

steps.title: Ethanol Dehydration (100%)
steps.instruction: Dehydration in 100% ethanol for 5 minutes x3.

steps.title: Propylene Oxide Dehydration
steps.instruction: Dehydration in propylene oxide for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Epon Resin Infiltration (25%)
steps.instruction: Infiltration in 25% Epon resin (Embed 812) in propylene oxide several hours

steps.title: Epon Resin Infiltration (50%)
steps.instruction: Infiltration in 50% Epon in propylene oxide for several hours.

steps.title: Epon Resin Infiltration (75%)
steps.instruction: Infiltration in 75% Epon in propylene oxide overnight.
